training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Rite request: reduction on noise

### TOPIC
noise reduction

### COMPONENT
noise

### OPERATION
reduction

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- noise
- reduction

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us thy wisdom in the reduction of unwanted vibrations and discord.
First: Anoint the acoustic dampening matrices with sacred unguents, invoking the Machine Spirit to silence the noise that corrupts our sacred work.
Second: Calibrate the noise-suppression protocols with reverent precision, ensuring the noise diminishes through blessed attenuation and frequency modulation.
Third: Verify the reduction of ambient disturbance through blessed auditory examination, confirming that noise yields to our holy reduction.
